'''Noonar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Noonian system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]], Noonar was host to the pacifist [[Noonar Confederacy]], which controlled a key stretch of territory between the two galactic powers. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Noonar was run by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] [[Trophan Thanis]].<ref name="AJ2" />
